name: Traveler Sandwiches W/Sun-Dried Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Oil-packed tomatoes, drained (reserve oil), sliced
1/2 cup Black olives, pitted and chopped
1/2 cup Pimientos, drained from jar (4 oz)
3/4 cup Watercress, chopped (keep 1/4 of the bunch for dressing)
recipeInstructions:
1. Divide the baguette into four sections and slice each in half horizontally.
2. Hollow out the centers slightly and mix bread crumbs into the filling.
3. Spoon dressing evenly over the bread halves.
4. Heap filling onto the halves.
5. Press the halves together and wrap each portion tightly in aluminum foil.
6. Keeps for up to 6 hours without refrigeration.
